name: Watercress, Yam and Kashi Pecan Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil over high heat. Add the soy sauce and Kashi pilaf. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
2. Turn off the heat and set aside to cool. Chill several hours.
3. Bake the yam or cook in the microwave until cooled. Chill several hours.
4. Peel and cut into bite-sized pieces.
5. Sprinkle with a grinding of coarse salt.
6. Pan roast in a dry non-stick skillet the pecan pieces over low heat for about 4 minutes, or until they become fragrant. Set aside to cool.
7. Chop green parts and some green of green onions. Chop cilantro.
8. In a medium-size bowl, combine all ingredients except watercress. Chill before serving.
9. Arrange watercress on plates; mound the salad on top.
